data.content: Shipment review approved. Verified: (1) merge commit c7a4f84d7987 is HEAD of main with kno doctor hint at self_manage.rs:191 and old hooks install hint fully removed, (2) all 3 commits tagged, (3) no invariants to check, (4) CI green on c7a4f84d7987 (Repo Hygiene, Changesets, Release all passed), (5) change is narrowly scoped to upgrade messaging with no regressions.
